nodes.speaker: Zhou Botong
nodes.text: Hahaha! Someone's come to play with the Old Urchin! Who are you? Have you come to play Go with the Old Urchin?

nodes.speaker: Zhou Botong
nodes.text: The Old Urchin loves playing with people! Can you play Go? I have a special technique called 'Ambidextrous Fighting' - it's so fun!

nodes.speaker: Zhou Botong
nodes.text: 'Ambidextrous Fighting' is amazing - it lets you split your mind and play two moves at once! Hehe, want to learn?

options.text: Old Senior, I'd like to play another game with you

nodes.speaker: Zhou Botong
nodes.text: Haha! You don't know? 'Ambidextrous Fighting' means your left hand and right hand do different things at the same time - amazing, right?

nodes.speaker: Zhou Botong
nodes.text: When playing Go, you can think about two paths and play two moves at once! Your opponent thinks you can only play one move, but you play two - hehe!

options.text: That's amazing! Please teach me, Old Senior

nodes.speaker: Zhou Botong
nodes.text: Good good good! But you have to play a game with the Old Urchin first, let me see if you have the talent.

nodes.speaker: Zhou Botong
nodes.text: The Old Urchin may love to play, but I'm serious about Go! If you can beat me, I'll teach you 'Ambidextrous Fighting'!

options.text: Alright! Please guide me, Old Senior!

nodes.speaker: Zhou Botong
nodes.text: Hahaha! Come come come, let's have fun!

nodes.speaker: Zhou Botong
nodes.text: Wow! You're so good! You actually beat the Old Urchin! Good good good, I'll teach you 'Ambidextrous Fighting'!

nodes.speaker: Zhou Botong
nodes.text: The key to this technique is: split your mind, think about two paths, play two moves at once! Can be used once per game with a 30-move cooldown.

nodes.speaker: Zhou Botong
nodes.text: Remember, when using this technique, 'left hand draws circle, right hand draws square' - don't mix them up! The Old Urchin practiced for a long time to learn it!

nodes.speaker: Zhou Botong
nodes.text: Hahaha! You learned it! When you meet strong opponents in the future, use this technique and you'll definitely win!

options.text: I'd like to chat with you more
I want to challenge you again

nodes.speaker: Zhou Botong
nodes.text: Aiya, it's okay! The Old Urchin has practiced for so many years, of course I'm good! Practice more and come back next time!

nodes.speaker: Zhou Botong
nodes.text: The Old Urchin loves playing the most! Playing Go, catching crickets, climbing trees - everything is fun!

nodes.speaker: Zhou Botong
nodes.text: In life, being happy is most important! Those people with stern faces all the time are so boring! Don't you agree?

nodes.speaker: Zhou Botong
nodes.text: Aiya, you're leaving? Okay, come back and play with the Old Urchin when you're ready!

nodes.speaker: Zhou Botong
nodes.text: Hahaha! Come play again next time! The Old Urchin always welcomes you!
